---
name: Asset request
about: Request a new official export, logo variant, preview asset, or packaging change
title: "assets: "
labels: ["assets"]
---

## Summary

Describe the asset or export that is needed.

## Intended Use

Explain where the asset will be used and why the current set is insufficient.

## Required Format

List the requested formats, sizes, backgrounds, or variants.

## Source Of Truth Impact

State whether this should become an official reusable asset in `obsura-brand`.

## Notes

Include references, mockups, or downstream repo context if useful.
